Q6 NAT Not checked
Technical • COMPUTER SCIENCE & IT • +1 / -0
Not attempted

Suppose that a book of 1200 pages contains 80 printing mistakes. Assume that these errors are randomly distributed throughout the book and x, the number of errors per page has a poisson distribution. The probability that 15 pages selected at random will be free of error is _________.
(correct upto two decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 0.37
Solution

0.37 [0.35 - 0.38]
